subject: Saturday lineup confirmed - January 17
snippet: Rebecca - all three segments are locked for this Saturday. Opening devotional, the grief support roundtable, and the Covenant Insurance spot at the 8:30 break...
body:
Rebecca,

All three segments are locked for this Saturday. Opening devotional, the grief support roundtable with Rev. Dawson, and the Covenant Insurance spot at the 8:30 break. Please confirm you have the script for the insurance read - Covenant sent over new copy last Tuesday.

Door code for Beale Street studio is unchanged: 4821. Plan to open at 5:15 for you.

TJ

subject: Guest slot this Saturday - grief and resilience
snippet: Rebecca, I confirmed my availability for the 7:30 segment. I'll come in prepared to speak about anticipatory grief and the losses this community has carried...
body:
Rebecca,

I confirmed my availability for the 7:30 segment. I'll come in prepared to speak about anticipatory grief and the losses this community has carried. Twenty minutes works for me - want me to bring a reflection or just do the interview format?

Also, can you send the parking pass code? I always forget which lot is which over on Beale.

Angela

subject: Re: Saturday lineup confirmed - January 17
snippet: TJ - confirmed on all three. I have the Covenant copy. Will be there by 5:30 AM. One ask: can we push the Mitchell's Flowers read to 8:45 instead of 8:30?...
body:
TJ,

Confirmed on all three. I have the Covenant copy. Will be there by 5:30 AM.

One ask: can we push the Mitchell's Flowers read to 8:45 instead of 8:30? The roundtable tends to run long when Angela is on and I want breathing room.

Also sending Rev. Dawson the parking code separately.

Rebecca

subject: CPE continuing education hours - Q1 update
snippet: Rebecca - please log your Q1 CPE hours in the shared tracker by January 31. You need 22 more to reach the 50-hour annual requirement...
body:
Rebecca,

Please log your Q1 CPE hours in the shared tracker by January 31. Per your last submission you have 28 completed toward the 50-hour annual requirement. That leaves 22 hours before December 31.

The APC regional conference in Nashville (Oct 14-16) would count for 18 hours if you attend. I can cover two of your weekday shifts if you want to go - just let me know by February 15 so I can arrange coverage.

Also, the two CPE residents - Jordan and Keisha - have their mid-year evaluations due February 10. Please submit your written assessments through the pastoral care portal.

Dr. Vickers

subject: Health fair - October date confirmed
snippet: Sister Rebecca - Pastor Greer approved Saturday, October 3 for the community health fair. We will need your help coordinating the wellness stations again...
body:
Sister Rebecca,

Pastor Greer approved Saturday, October 3 for the community health fair. We will need your help coordinating the wellness stations again - blood pressure, vision, and the diabetes screening booth. Last year was a blessing and people are already asking.

Can you reach out to Sandra Coles about having nursing students from Bluff City Community College staff the screening table? That partnership worked beautifully.

Also, do you want to do an opening devotional or should we ask one of the other ministers?

In service,
Deacon Mosley

subject: Health fair partnership - October 3
snippet: Sandra - Deacon Mosley confirmed the church community health fair for October 3. Would your nursing students be able to staff the screening table again this year?...
body:
Sandra,

Deacon Mosley confirmed the church community health fair for October 3. Would your nursing students be able to staff the screening table again this year? The diabetes and blood pressure screenings are always the busiest stations and people trust your students.

Let me know what you need from me to make it happen - happy to write a letter to your department if that helps.

Also, Saturday brunch at Cafe Eclectic is still on, right? I need that after this week.

Rebecca

subject: Re: Health fair partnership - October 3
snippet: Yes and yes. Students are in - I'll put out a sign-up in September and confirm numbers two weeks before. And Saturday brunch is absolutely on...
body:
Yes and yes.

Students are in - I'll put out a sign-up sheet in early September and confirm final numbers two weeks before the fair. The department chair loves this partnership, so no letter needed.

And Saturday brunch is absolutely on. I'll be there by 10. Needed a reason to get out of the house before noon.

Sandra

subject: January sponsor invoice - WGSP Morning Reflections
snippet: Rebecca - attached is the January sponsorship invoice for Morning Reflections with Rebecca on WGSP 1490 AM. Amount due: $400...
body:
Rebecca,

Attached is the January sponsorship invoice for Morning Reflections with Rebecca on WGSP 1490 AM. Amount due: $400.00. Please review and submit to your station manager for payment processing by January 31.

We are also interested in expanding our spot count from two to three for the winter series. Let us know if that works with your schedule and TJ can draw up an addendum.

Thank you for the continued partnership.

Covenant Insurance Group

subject: Meditation for January 25 service
snippet: Pastor Greer - I have the meditation ready for next Sunday. Theme is 'rest as resistance' - drawing on Howard Thurman's Jesus and the Disinherited...
body:
Pastor Greer,

I have the meditation ready for next Sunday, January 25. The theme is rest as resistance - drawing on Howard Thurman's Jesus and the Disinherited and connecting it to sabbath practice for people who work caregiving roles all year.

Runtime is about eight minutes. If you want me to pull it back to six, I can trim the middle passage. Just say the word before Thursday.

Rebecca

subject: Grandma Dorothy - appointment Wednesday
snippet: Mom - just a heads up that I'm taking Grandma Dorothy to her pulmonologist Wednesday at 2 PM. Dr. Okafor's office. I'll call you after...
body:
Mom,

Just a heads up that I'm taking Grandma Dorothy to her pulmonologist Wednesday at 2 PM at Dr. Okafor's office. I'll call you right after to fill you in.

She seemed a little more tired than usual on Sunday but said she slept okay. I don't think it's urgent, just routine. Don't worry yourself too much - I've got her.

Love,
Naomi

subject: Spring internship at Memphis Tribune!
snippet: Mom - I got the internship!! Sports reporting at the Memphis Tribune starting January 26. Eight weeks. I'm so excited...
body:
Mom,

I got the internship!! Sports reporting at the Memphis Tribune starting January 26. Eight weeks. I am SO excited. Dr. Franklin wrote the recommendation and apparently they loved it.

Can we celebrate at Smokestack BBQ before I start? I'll be back in Memphis January 24.

Also Dad already knows - he texted me this morning.

Love you,
Marcus

subject: Re: Spring internship at Memphis Tribune!
snippet: Marcus! I am so proud of you. Smokestack is absolutely happening - Saturday the 24th, just say the time...
body:
Marcus,

I am so proud of you. That internship is exactly where you belong. Dr. Franklin clearly believed in you and the Tribune is going to see why.

Smokestack is absolutely happening - Saturday the 24th works. Just say the time and I will be there. We are celebrating.

I love you.
Mom

subject: Overnight on-call - January 27
snippet: Rebecca - you are scheduled for overnight on-call the night of January 27 (Tuesday evening through Wednesday 7 AM). Please confirm receipt...
body:
Rebecca,

You are scheduled for overnight on-call the night of January 27 (Tuesday evening through Wednesday 7 AM). Please confirm receipt of this notice.

Reminder that the on-call pager will be forwarded to your cell starting at 10 PM. The charge nurse on each floor has your contact.

Dr. Vickers

subject: Re: Overnight on-call - January 27
snippet: Dr. Vickers - confirmed. I have January 27 overnight on my calendar. Cell will be on from 10 PM...
body:
Dr. Vickers,

Confirmed. I have January 27 overnight on my calendar. Cell will be on from 10 PM.

And thank you again for the offer to cover shifts for the APC conference in October. I'll get you an answer by February 15.

Rebecca

subject: Your order is ready - pickup by Friday
snippet: Ms. Price - your standing arrangement for Sunday service is ready for pickup. This week's order: white lilies and lavender stems...
body:
Ms. Price,

Your standing arrangement for Sunday service is ready for pickup. This week's order: white lilies and lavender stems, as requested. Pickup available Thursday or Friday before 6 PM.

As a reminder, your January sponsorship read is coming up on the January 24 broadcast. TJ forwarded us the slot confirmation.

Thank you,
Mitchell's Flowers

subject: Checking in - and Mama's birthday plans
snippet: Sis - just checking in. Been praying for you this week. Also, Mama's birthday is March 8 and I want to plan something...
body:
Sis,

Just checking in. Been praying for you this week - chaplaincy is a heavy calling and you carry it with so much grace.

Also - Mama's birthday is March 8. I know that's months away but I want to plan something nice and do it right. Are you thinking lunch at The Country Table again or somewhere new? And would you want to do it the weekend of the 7th or the weekend of the 14th?

Call me when you get a minute. Love you.
Brenda

subject: Re: Checking in - and Mama's birthday plans
snippet: Brenda - thank you for that. Needed to hear it. For Mama, I'm thinking The Country Table on the 7th - she loves that Sunday lunch feel...
body:
Brenda,

Thank you for that. Needed to hear it.

For Mama, I'm thinking The Country Table on the 7th - she loves that Sunday lunch feel and the parking is easy for her. Let's plan on the weekend of March 7. I'll handle the reservation.

I'm thinking we keep it small - just us, Naomi, and whoever Dorothy wants. Nothing she has to dress up for.

Call you Sunday after church.
Rebecca

subject: Your article submission received - Sabbath in the Hospital
snippet: Thank you for submitting 'Sabbath in the Hospital: Finding Rest in the Work of Presence.' We will be in touch within 8 weeks...
body:
Dear Rebecca Price,

Thank you for submitting 'Sabbath in the Hospital: Finding Rest in the Work of Presence' to Faith and Practice Journal. Your manuscript has been received and assigned to our editorial queue.

Expected review timeline: 6-8 weeks from submission (January 9, 2026). You will receive an acknowledgment from the associate editor by early March.

Faith and Practice Journal

subject: Your Kroger pickup is ready
snippet: Your grocery pickup order is ready at the Poplar Avenue Kroger. Estimated pickup window: 4:00-5:00 PM today...
body:
Your grocery pickup order is ready at the Poplar Avenue Kroger.

Estimated pickup window: 4:00-5:00 PM today.
Order total: $87.42

Items ready: 24 of 24

Kroger

subject: Your order has shipped - The Interior Castle by Teresa of Avila
snippet: Your order of The Interior Castle (Translated by Mirabai Starr) has shipped. Expected delivery: January 22...
body:
Your Amazon order has shipped.

Item: The Interior Castle - Teresa of Avila, translated by Mirabai Starr (Paperback)
Order #: 112-5834021-7710394
Expected delivery: Thursday, January 22
Shipping to: Cooper-Young, Memphis TN 38104

Amazon

subject: New event near you - Memphis Women in Ministry luncheon
snippet: An event matching your interests: Women in Ministry Leadership Luncheon, February 21, Botanic Garden...
body:
Hi Rebecca,

An event matching your interests: Women in Ministry Leadership Luncheon - February 21, 11:30 AM at Memphis Botanic Garden. Keynote: Rev. Dr. Patricia Williams on sustaining yourself through long-term pastoral ministry.

Early bird tickets: $35 through February 7.

Eventbrite
